_description: Master manifest. One entry per show. All episode data lives in the show's own file.

_agent_instructions.get_show: Fetch {slug}.json for all show metadata and episodes
_agent_instructions.get_random: Fetch each show file → pick randomly from any seasons.*.episodes array, merge show-level fields into each episode
_agent_instructions.add_show: Create {slug}.json → add entry here with status: stub
_agent_instructions.add_season: Edit {slug}.json → add key to seasons object → update seasons_available here

shows.show: THE WARRIOR PRINCESS AND THE BARBARIC KING
shows.show_full: The Warrior Princess and the Barbaric King
